title: Functional vs. Cross-Functional Scaling
description: Architect organizational scaling strategies by evaluating the trade-offs between functional and cross-functional teams. Compare the effectiveness of centralized "Core" teams versus decentralized "Embedded" specialists for specific technical domains.
objectives: Architect organizational scaling strategies by evaluating the trade-offs between functional and cross-functional teams.
Compare the effectiveness of centralized "Core" teams versus decentralized "Embedded" specialists for specific technical domains.
